places.name: Thrikkakara
places.modernInfo: The only temple where Vamana is the main deity. The origin of Onam festival. Mahabali is said to return here every year during Onam.

scenes.title: The dwarf asks for three paces of land
scenes.description: King Mahabali's generosity was so great he had conquered the three worlds. Vishnu came as a dwarf brahmin boy and asked for 'just three paces of land'. Mahabali laughed and agreed. The dwarf expanded to cosmic size.

scenes.title: Vamana measures the universe
scenes.description: With the first step Vamana covered the Earth. With the second step he covered the heavens. There was nowhere left for the third step. Mahabali offered his own head — and was pushed to the underworld. But Vishnu granted him the right to return to Kerala every year: that day is Onam.
